character.definition: (ancient form of 牋 箋) a memorandum tablet, slip of paper, fancy note-paper, a note, a document, comments
(same as 毹) woolen blanket with decorative design or pattern, to waste; to destroy
(same as 肙 蜎) a small worm; larvae of mosquitoes, empty, to twist; to surround
favus, tinea favosa; fungal infection of the scalp
